plain_language_conclusion: Old selected/oracle arithmetic wins are search-verifier evidence, not general LM ability. Preserve the causal ingredient, not the overclaim.

old_success_rows.label: Stage56_K128
old_success_rows.plain_language_proves: candidate search plus verifier selection works on a compact synthetic arithmetic/state-space exam
old_success_rows.does_not_prove: free language generation, multilingual ability, or one-body general LM reasoning
old_success_rows.causal_ingredient: candidate diversity plus verifier-selected compact answers

recommended_comparison_row.causal_ingredient: candidate diversity plus verifier-selected compact answers
recommended_comparison_row.missing_in_current_run: free generation samples; selected-vs-oracle split on the normal one-body answer path; candidate diversity/coverage if search is claimed; depth or recurrent-core-off ablation
recommended_comparison_row.smallest_restoration_test: Run a small one-body language gate that logs candidate coverage, selected-vs-oracle accuracy, free generation samples, and recurrent/depth-off loss deltas on the same heldout rows.
